# awscc_cleanroomsml_configured_model_algorithm_association (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::CleanRoomsML::ConfiguredModelAlgorithmAssociation

## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `collaboration_identifier` (String)
- `configured_model_algorithm_arn` (String)
- `configured_model_algorithm_association_arn` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `membership_identifier` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `privacy_configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--privacy_configuration))
- `tags` (Attributes Set) An arbitrary set of tags (key-value pairs) for this cleanrooms-ml configured model algorithm association. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
